archetype_reasoning: This trader has an extraordinary win rate (92% Trump_US, 92.8% Russia_UKR) across nearly 1,400 trades in those two domains, indicating genuine deep edge. However, the 'Other' domain shows a catastrophic 9.2% accuracy across 502 trades, meaning the trader is essentially randomizing — or worse — outside their core domains. With only 4 distinct geo markets, the specialization is extreme and the bifurcation in accuracy is the defining feature.
domain_blindspots: Other: 9.2% accuracy across 456 losses is catastrophic — well below random chance, suggesting anti-edge or persistent mispricing in unfamiliar markets
domain_summary: This trader has exceptional, probably top-tier edge in Russia-Ukraine and Trump/US political markets, with near-92% accuracy across well over 1,200 resolved trades. Outside these two domains, their accuracy collapses dramatically to near zero — treat any signal outside Russia_UKR and Trump_US as noise or potentially contra-indicator.
signal_weight_reasoning: The trader's signal is extremely valuable within Russia_UKR and Trump_US but the 'Other' domain accuracy (9.2%) is so far below chance that following them outside core domains would be actively harmful. STR-003 should route FULL weight for Russia_UKR and Trump_US positions only, and invert or exclude any Other signals.
behavioural_flags: Heavy repetition within single markets — recent resolved trades show 15 consecutive entries on the same Harris question, suggesting averaging or scaling into a position across time
Directionality of 0.878 indicates strong one-directional conviction rather than hedging or LP behaviour
Appears to have concentrated recent activity on a single losing thesis (Harris dropping out), suggesting anchoring or conviction overhang
No open positions currently — may have exited after the Harris loss or is in a reset phase
risk_patterns: Catastrophic 'Other' domain performance (9.2% accuracy, 456 losses) suggests sunk-cost or stubborn thesis-maintenance outside area of expertise
15 sequential losing trades on same market at similar prices (0.65–0.73) suggests doubling-down or refusal to exit a deteriorating position
Extreme domain concentration (4 markets only) means any shift in geopolitical focus could render historical edge irrelevant
Realized PnL of $6.1M is large but the Harris cluster loss represents a significant drawdown event that warrants monitoring for behavioural change

notable_calls.market: Will Harris drop out of 2025 race before September?
notable_calls.significance: 15 consecutive losing entries at prices between 0.65–0.73, indicating a repeated doubling-down on a wrong thesis — this is the clearest demonstration of sunk-cost behaviour in their record
951 wins vs 74 losses (92.8% accuracy) across Russia-Ukraine markets is statistically extraordinary and the core reason for the trader's $6M+ PnL and LEGENDARY ELO
321 wins vs 28 losses (92% accuracy) across Trump/US markets corroborates genuine political forecasting edge in a second domain

open_positions_summary: No open positions. Trader appears to have fully exited following the Harris cluster loss. Could be in a cooldown period or awaiting new market opportunities in core domains.
watch_items: Monitor re-entry into Russia_UKR or Trump_US markets — these entries carry FULL signal weight
Watch whether trader returns to 'Other' domain markets; if so, consider contra-trading their position
Track whether the Harris loss triggers a behavioural shift — either abandoning high-conviction averaging or increasing risk tolerance
Monitor position sizing relative to historical norms; any significant scaling up could indicate either restored confidence or tilt
Watch for new open positions to gauge whether the trader is exiting a dormant phase
summary: This is a LEGENDARY-tier trader with genuinely exceptional edge in Russia-Ukraine and Trump/US political markets, supported by over 1,270 trades at ~92% accuracy — a statistical profile that demands serious attention. The $6.1M realized PnL validates the edge empirically. However, the 'Other' domain record (9.2% accuracy, 456 losses) is so poor it functions as a reliable contra-indicator, and the recent Harris cluster reveals a vulnerability to doubling-down on losing theses with repeated same-direction entries. Signal weight should be DOMAIN_ONLY: follow aggressively in Russia_UKR and Trump_US, and actively discount or invert any signal outside those domains.
